canonical_truth.summary: A large stag from outside the mapped territory passed through the east path corridor, pausing briefly at the channel edge before continuing east. Other creatures went quiet as it moved through.
canonical_truth.concrete_outcome: Stag passed through and continued; left a tuft of pale fur at the channel edge bark and browsed seeds at the shade corridor midpoint.

perception_prompt.noticeable_surface: small birds going still in sequence along the east path — then calling down from high branches; something large is moving through, unhurried

authorial_note.real_world_inspiration: King Charles and Queen Camilla arrive in the US for a 4-day state visit — first British royal state visit in decades
authorial_note.translation_logic: Formal arrival from distant territory maps to a large unfamiliar creature crossing known ground with deliberate bearing; the social adjustment of other creatures (quieting then calling) is the physical surface YY encounters first
authorial_note.restraint_reason: The visitor does not interact with YY directly; it passes through and leaves only traces — consistent with a dignitary who does not acknowledge individual locals
